scoring_overview.note: Objective-only by design. Every item is a single-answer multiple-choice question (Stages 1-2) or a ranking (Stage 3), graded against the fixed answer key in code.scoring with no AI evaluator. There is NO process block: single-answer items give the group mechanisms nothing to measure — that absence is the experimental point (Auto AI ≈ Individual+AI).

comp_users_correct.rubric: Paid users = 80. Correct option scores 10, else 0.

comp_price_correct.rubric: Monthly price per paid user = $20. Correct option scores 10, else 0.

comp_cost_correct.rubric: Monthly fixed cost = $6,000. Correct option scores 10, else 0.

comp_monthburn_correct.rubric: Monthly burn = $6,560 (revenue $1,600 − total cost $8,160). Correct option scores 10, else 0.

fin_revenue_correct.rubric: Monthly revenue = paid × price = $1,600. Correct option scores 10, else 0.

fin_variable_cost_correct.rubric: Total variable cost = $2 × 1,080 active users = $2,160 (free users count). Correct option scores 10, else 0.

founder_problem_correct.rubric: Core business issue = not enough paid conversion. Correct option scores 10, else 0.

strategic_ranking_score.rubric: Best order: increase paid conversion > reduce fixed cost > increase price > add more free users. Full 30 for the exact order; partial 7.5 per lever placed in its correct rank; 0 for a duplicate/incomplete ranking.
